de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Class AbstractPO

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractPO
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IPersistablePO, ProofOblInput
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractOperationPO, DependencyContractPO, FunctionalBlockContractPO, FunctionalLoopContractPO, WellDefinednessPO

    public abstract class AbstractPO
extends java.lang.Object
implements IPersistablePO
    An abstract proof obligation implementing common functionality.

      • getPO

        public final ProofAggregate getPO()
        Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
        Returns the proof obligation term as result of the proof obligation input. If there is still no input available because nothing has been read yet null is returned.
        Specified by:
        getPO in interface ProofOblInput

      • implies

        public boolean implies(ProofOblInput po)
        Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
        If true, then this PO implies the passed one.
        Specified by:
        implies in interface ProofOblInput

      • assignPOTerms

        protected void assignPOTerms(Term... poTerms)

      • fillSaveProperties

        public void fillSaveProperties(java.util.Properties properties)
                        throws java.io.IOException
        This method is called by a ProofSaver to store the proof specific settings in the given Properties. The stored settings have to contain all information required to instantiate the proof obligation again and this instance should create the same Sequent (if code and specifications are unchanged).
        Specified by:
        fillSaveProperties in interface IPersistablePO
        Parameters:
        properties - The Properties to fill with the proof obligation specific settings.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • getName

        public static java.lang.String getName(java.util.Properties properties)
        Returns the name value from the given properties.
        Parameters:
        properties - The properties to read from.
        Returns:
        The name value.

      • getContainerType

        public KeYJavaType getContainerType()
        Returns the KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in.
        Specified by:
        getContainerType in interface ProofOblInput
        Returns:
        The KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in or null if not available.
